opinion.h4: 386 U.S. 268"> WACKENHUT CORP. ET AL. v. APONTE, SUPERINTENDENT OF POLICE, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF PUERTO RICO. No. 726. Decided March 13, 1967.
opinion.p: Donald M. Hall for Wackenhut Corp. et al., and William B. Graves for Marvil International Security Services, Inc., appellants.
J. B. Fernandez Badillo, Solicitor General of Puerto Rico, and Peter Ortiz, Assistant Solicitor General, for appellees.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
